description: Maps PSGuerrilla audit check IDs to compliance framework requirements. Covers FERPA, COPPA, CIPA, NIST SP 800-171, and state education technology privacy laws.

FERPA.fullName: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act
FERPA.description: Federal law protecting the privacy of student education records

COPPA.description: Federal law protecting personal information of children under 13

CIPA.description: Federal law requiring E-rate recipients to filter internet access and monitor online activity

NIST-171.description: Protecting Controlled Unclassified Information in nonfederal systems

STATE-EDTECH.description: Aggregate of common state education technology privacy requirements (e.g., SOPIPA, state SPAs)

FERPA.requirement: Reasonable methods to ensure only authorized access to education records

COPPA.requirement: Reasonable security for children's personal information

NIST-171.requirement: Multi-factor authentication for privileged and network accounts

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Multi-factor authentication for systems containing student data

NIST-171.requirement: Enforce minimum password complexity and length

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Strong password requirements for accounts accessing student data

NIST-171.requirement: Terminate sessions after defined inactivity period

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Enhanced authentication for administrative access to student data systems

NIST-171.requirement: Employ the principle of least privilege

FERPA.requirement: Limit disclosure of education records to authorized parties

COPPA.requirement: Limit sharing of children's personal information

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Restrict external sharing of student data files

FERPA.requirement: Prevent unauthorized disclosure of education records

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Data loss prevention for student PII

COPPA.requirement: Verifiable parental consent before collecting children's data via third parties

FERPA.requirement: Limit access to education records to school officials with legitimate interest

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Vet and approve third-party applications accessing student data

COPPA.requirement: Collect only necessary personal information from children

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Minimize third-party app access to student data scopes

FERPA.requirement: Prevent unauthorized disclosure of education records via email forwarding

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Block automatic email forwarding to external domains for accounts with student data access

FERPA.requirement: Content scanning for PII in outbound email

CIPA.requirement: Technology protection measures for electronic communications

FERPA.requirement: Control external access to systems containing education records

COPPA.requirement: Restrict children's ability to share personal information publicly

FERPA.requirement: Maintain record of access to education records

NIST-171.requirement: Create and retain system audit logs

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Audit logging for all access to student data systems

FERPA.requirement: Maintain access records for the life of the education record

NIST-171.requirement: Retain audit logs per organizational policy

COPPA.requirement: Reasonable security for children's data on devices

CIPA.requirement: Technology protection measures on devices used by minors

FERPA.requirement: Prevent unauthorized disclosure via mail forwarding

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Block external mail forwarding for accounts with student data

FERPA.requirement: Restrict external access to document repositories containing education records

COPPA.requirement: Limit sharing of documents containing children's personal information

NIST-171.requirement: Limit system access to authorized users and devices

STATE-EDTECH.requirement: Context-aware access controls for student data systems

NIST-171.requirement: Enforce password complexity and minimum length
Employ the principle of least privilege

FERPA.requirement: Limit access to education records to officials with legitimate interest

COPPA.requirement: Reasonable security on devices accessing children's data

CIPA.requirement: Technology protection measures on school-issued devices
